title: bauhinia goyazensis
intro: Bauhinia goyazensis, also known as the Ceara tree, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Amazon region, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bauhinia goyazensis include the treatment of various conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. Bauhinia goyazensis is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to create herbal remedies for these health benefits.
